events.title: Fangs in the mirror
events.text: Two sharp little points appear when you smile. Your family realizes this {noun} is not entirely human.

choices.label: Practice hiding them
choices.outcome: You learn to smile carefully. Secrecy becomes second nature.

choices.label: Show your family
choices.outcome: Your parents promise to protect your secret and start researching unusual family recipes.

events.title: A suspiciously sunny school trip
events.text: The class is heading outdoors at midday, and the sunlight already feels too bright.

choices.label: Stay in every patch of shade
choices.outcome: You finish the trip exhausted but undiscovered.

choices.label: Pretend to feel ill
choices.outcome: You spend the afternoon indoors while rumors spread that the {noun} from class hates sunlight.

events.title: The hunger beneath everything
events.text: Your supernatural hunger becomes impossible to ignore, though nobody around you knows why you seem distracted.

choices.label: Use a safe synthetic substitute
choices.outcome: It tastes terrible, but nobody is harmed and the hunger finally quiets.

choices.label: Try to endure it
choices.outcome: You keep control, but the effort leaves you drained and irritable.
